checker.location: Repo root — integrated into pre-deploy validation flow

exit_codes.0: Gate passed or no SEO-sensitive files changed
exit_codes.1: Gate FAILED — missing evidence or scores below threshold

filesMonitored.newSEOPages: Any new page.tsx in src/app/ that is not auth/dashboard/api/all-pages/cookies/privacy/terms/contact/about/methodology/editorial-policy

optionalFields: gscEvidence (object with hasGSCData, impressions28d, averagePosition, ctr, currentRankingUrl, wrongPageRanking)

passFailThresholds.rankingDifficultyScore: Informational — no hard floor, but must be 0-100

finalDecision.HOLD: Gate passes with warning — evidence complete but decision is to hold
finalDecision.REJECT: Gate FAILS — decision is to reject, do not deploy

validEvidencePasses.description: Evidence file with all required fields and scores above thresholds
validEvidencePasses.expectedResult: PASS — all scores above thresholds, finalDecision IMPROVE_EXISTING

missingEvidenceFails.description: SEO-sensitive file changed without matching evidence file

lowScoreEvidenceFails.description: Evidence file present but uniqueness score below 90

rejectedDecisionBlocks.description: Evidence complete but finalDecision is REJECT

noSEOChangesPasses.description: Only non-SEO files changed (e.g., components, auth pages)

confirmation.noPageCreatedFromImagination: TRUE — Every new SEO page or title change requires .optimizer-data/search-demand-gate/<page-id>.json with GSC evidence, SERP intent check, competitor weakness analysis, and 5-axis scoring.
confirmation.noDeployIfGateFails: TRUE — Script exits with code 1 on any failure. Must be integrated into pre-deploy validation. If gate fails, deploy is blocked.
confirmation.noNewPagesCreated: TRUE — This is enforcement infrastructure only. Zero new SEO pages, zero title edits, zero sitemap changes.
confirmation.noTitleEdits: TRUE — No titles modified. Enforcement system is passive until changes are attempted.
confirmation.noIndexingRequests: TRUE — No GSC indexing requests submitted.
confirmation.noPhase35MonitoringDisruption: TRUE — Phase 35 continues independently. This is a gate, not a monitor.
confirmation.nonDestructiveEnforcement: TRUE — Checker reads files only. Does not modify repo, revert changes, or alter anything. It only reports pass/fail.

nextSteps.integration: Add to pre-deploy validation (package.json scripts or Vercel build step)
nextSteps.existingEvidence: Only calculator-metadata.json (sample template). All other page IDs need evidence files BEFORE any changes to those files.
nextSteps.cronMonitoring: Optional — could add daily cron to check for uncommitted SEO-sensitive changes
